$HAI

Real Yield, Prediction Market, Research-to-Earn and Governance

The key to Hacken Web3 ecosystem

$HAI is more than a token—it’s the fuel for an ecosystem that drives security solutions while connecting research, skill-building, and real-world impact. Backed by Hacken’s evolving community, $HAI opens access to tools and opportunities for those looking to shape a more transparent Web3.

Whether you’re diving into DeFi, researching blockchain data, gaining in-demand skills, or simply holding, $HAI gives you a stake in Hacken’s success and supports the movement toward trust in the digital world.

How to $HAI

hAI App

hAI App

Your one-stop shop and the heart of the $HAI ecosystem, bringing all essential tools together.

Manage your assets and track rewards in one secure app.

App Store Google Play

Get $HAI

Get $HAI

Easily join the ecosystem by purchasing $HAI on popular crypto exchanges.

Additionally, you can earn $HAI:

  1. Join Trust Army forces
  2. Win community competitions
  3. Expose bad actors in DYOR Quests (Coming soon)

Explore ecosystem

Explore ecosystem

Every part of the $HAI ecosystem is built to enhance your DeFi experience and reward efforts.

Explore opportunities like DYOR, loyalty programs, referral bonuses, learn-to-earn initiatives and the first Cybersecurity Prediction Market with APYs up to 180%.

Learn more

Level up quests

Level up quests

Discover new opportunities, sharpen your skills and connect with the $HAI community through exciting quests in the Hacken ecosystem.

Complete challenges and level up your crypto journey. Claim your first reward in just 10 minutes!

Ecosystem Quest

Discord

Connect with like-minded people, join relaxed chats and hang out with $HAI OGs. Get support with Trust Army tasks, participate in hDAO votes and share your ideas while staying updated on the latest news and discussions.
